title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 143.433 - No corporate income tax return or other document filing required, when
text:
143.433.  No corporate income tax return or other document filing required, when. — Notwithstanding any law to the contrary, any entity not subject to the tax on corporations under subsection 2 of section 143.441 shall not be required to complete or file any document or return related to corporate income taxes.
(L. 2018 S.B. 769)
